zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Marrow於1459年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London40歲，母親Margaret Rich29歲。她於1475年與Robert Throckmorton在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1513年在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾庫頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Marrow于1459年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London40岁，母亲Margaret Rich29岁。她于1475年与Robert Throckmorton在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1513年在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾庫頓。

nameMeanings.name: Marrow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English marwe, marowe ‘companion, mate’.

variants.name: Marra
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Rocco, Carmine, Salvatore, Enrico, Pasquale, Sal, Vincenzo, Alessandro, Gaetano, Marino.
Italian (southern): habitational name from any of the places so called in central and southern Italy, from marra ‘heap of stones’.

Italian, Galician, and Portuguese: from marra ‘hoe’, in Galician and Portuguese also ‘big mallet for breaking stones’ (from Latin marra), presumably a metonymic occupational name for one who made such implements or for one who used them.

variants.name: Merrow
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Marrow  .
English: habitational name from Merrow in Surrey, apparently derived from Old English mearg ‘marrow, fat’, used figuratively to mean ‘fertile ground’.
Americanized form of French   Amirault   or of any of its altered forms. Compare   Meraw   and   Mero   4.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Marrow was born in 1459, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London, was 40 and her mother, Margaret Rich, was 29. She married Robert Throckmorton in 1475, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1513, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Marrow est née en 1459, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Rich, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Throckmorton en 1475, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1513, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Marrow 1459 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London 40 und ihre Mutter Margaret Rich 29. Sie hat 1475 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England Robert Throckmorton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1513 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Coughton, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Marrow è nata il nel 1459 nel London, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Margaret Rich, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Robert Throckmorton nel 1475, nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1513, nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Coughton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Marrowが1459年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of Londonは40歳，母Margaret Richは29歳であった。1475年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンでRobert Throckmortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1513年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Marrow(이)가 1459년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Rich(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1475년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 Robert Throckmorton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1513년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 코우그h턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Marrow nasceu em 1459, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Rich, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Throckmorton em 1475, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1513, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Marrow родилась в 1459 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Rich, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Throckmorton в 1475 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1513 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Marrow nació en 1459, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaret Rich, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Robert Throckmorton en 1475, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1513, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
